name: Mexican Tomato Rice
method: Place onion and the tomatoes in a blender, and blend it until it is
Add 2 cups of this mixture to a saucepan.
Add salt, chicken broth, and cumin. Bring it to boil over the medium
On the other hand, toast rice.
Over medium heat, heat the oil until shimmering.
Put rice and cook, stirring frequently. When it is golden and lightly

Lower the heat. And add garlic, then cook for around 30 seconds.
Put boiling tomato puree on the rice and mix thoroughly.
Lower the heat. Then cover it and cook. When the liquid is fully
absorbed, and rice is cooked, turn off the heat.

Season it with salt if needed, then serve.
